# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [The Mandalorian and Grogu Hits Record Low Star Wars Opening](https://zandani.co.ke/article/mandalorian-and-grogu-star-wars-box-office-record-low) - The Mandalorian and Grogu movie leads the Memorial Day box office while setting a new franchise low as the Michael Jackson biopic nears a major milestone.
- [PSC Declares Mistreatment of Interns a Criminal Offense](https://zandani.co.ke/article/psc-criminalizes-intern-mistreatment-government-offices) - PSC Declares Mistreatment of Interns a Criminal Offense: Public Service Commission officials in Naivasha declare intern mistreatment a criminal act,
- [Nameless Reacts to Viral AI Images Without Durag and Sunglasses](https://zandani.co.ke/article/nameless-reacts-viral-ai-images-without-durag-sunglasses) - Nameless Reacts to Viral AI Images Without Durag and Sunglasses: Kenyan musician Nameless responds with humor to viral AI-generated photos showing his face
- [Notts County promoted to League One after beating Salford City](https://zandani.co.ke/article/notts-county-promoted-to-league-one-after-salford-city-win) - Notts County achieved promotion to League One with a dominant 3-0 victory over Salford City in the play-off final, ending their season on a high note.
- [Kenya Boosts Youth Employment and Urban Infrastructure](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-nyota-kisip-youth-employment-infrastructure) - Kenya Boosts Youth Employment and Urban Infrastructure: Government initiatives like NYOTA and KISIP 2 aim to provide vocational training and improve living
- [Kenya Proposes New Digital Taxes as National Debt Peaks](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-finance-bill-digital-tax-public-debt) - Kenya Proposes New Digital Taxes as National Debt Peaks: The Finance Bill introduces taxes on smartphones and cryptocurrency as Kenya debt exceeds KSh 13
- [Flavour Sells Out London O2 Indigo with Highlife Performance](https://zandani.co.ke/article/flavour-sells-out-london-o2-indigo-highlife-concert) - Flavour Sells Out London O2 Indigo with Highlife Performance: Nigerian star Flavour brings highlife music to London with a sold-out concert at Indigo at The O2
- [Mpenzi Chokuu details her transformation from a manual laborer in Kisumu to a high-end socialite in Germany](https://zandani.co.ke/article/mpenzi-chokuu-details-her-transformation-from-a-manual-laborer-in-ki) - Mpenzi Chokuu details her transformation from a manual laborer in Kisumu to a high-end socialite in Germany to escape Kenya's harsh economic climate.
- [Law and Order SVU Boss Seeks Christopher Meloni Return](https://zandani.co.ke/article/law-and-order-svu-christopher-meloni-return-update) - Law and Order SVU Boss Seeks Christopher Meloni Return: Law and Order SVU showrunner Michele Fazekas wants Christopher Meloni to return as Elliot Stabler.
